description_long: This house features a steeply pitched dark gray gable roof with a prominent central chimney and white exterior walls accented by brick trim along the base. The front facade includes a small porch with brick steps, flanked by low hedges and flower planters, leading to a single front door with a round window. Symmetrical shuttered windows are present on both the ground and upper floors, providing a balanced and classic appearance. On one side, a patio area with outdoor furniture and a large leafy tree adds a touch of greenery and outdoor living space. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with additional windows and a secondary set of steps. The overall design is reminiscent of a traditional European cottage, blending clean lines with subtle decorative details.
description: A white, two-story house with a steep gable roof, central chimney, symmetrical shuttered windows, and a small front porch with brick steps and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with brick steps, a small porch, symmetrical windows, and a patio area with outdoor furniture and a tree to the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large tree, patio area, and the side wall with a single window and a secondary set of steps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simple facade with two large shuttered windows and the roof's full span, with the tree partially visible to the left.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side elevation with multiple windows, the chimney, and a clear view of the patio and garden elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a round window, brick steps, small porch, flanking hedges, and decorative planters.
